no: Golem Construction for Spellcasters v6.4 by Argent77. Adds comprehensive golem crafting system with 6 golem types in 4 power tiers. INSTALL ORDER CRITICAL: Must install AFTER Spell Revisions (and any mod that modifies stats.ids). GC compiles AI scripts using Detectable Spells stat names; if stats.ids is modified after compilation, later mods using DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH will fail. FORBID: cn:10 conflicts with RR cn:8 (Upgradeable Equipment). ToF also includes flesh/bone golem content.

conflicts.reason: Both modify the Tome of Golems item; Golem Construction replaces the manual entirely while MiH improves it
Both revise golem types. Install MiH EQ before Golem Construction. MiH modifies creature stats; GC adds new golem construction mechanics. Complementary — different aspects of golem gameplay.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Golem Construction #25 Greater variety #35 Vulnerable to spells #40 Reduced immunities

new: Constructs a clay golem from materials.
Constructs a stone golem from materials.
Constructs an iron golem from materials.
Constructs an adamantine golem from materials.

sum: Lets spellcasters research and build custom golems as permanent companions. Adds crafting quests, materials gathering, and 10 golem types from flesh to adamantine.

co.no: Core golem construction system. Adds 6 volumes of golem manuals (flesh, clay, stone, iron, mithral, adamantite) with 4 variants each (lesser to perfect). Spellcasters learn to build golems as companions. Uses Detectable Spells stats in AI scripts — MUST install after Spell Revisions to avoid broken stat references. Adds 0 kit slots. PARSE ERRORS (×4, non-fatal): ar0602_bottom.baf lines 66/68/80/82 — RemoveSpellRES triggers non-fatal PARSE warning. Same bug pattern as Brandock. Golem cleanup scripts won't fire correctly. WeiDU recovers and continues.
Replaces vanilla Golem Manual with GC's version. HARD CONFLICT: FORBID_COMPONENT RR cn:8 (Upgradeable Equipment). RR cn:8 IS — this component will auto-skip. Remove .
Enhances enemy mage/priest AI against golems — they'll use appropriate spells and tactics. Note: items used by MiH Encounters & Quests' Revised Golems (cn:2) may be removed. BG2EE/EET only.

Adds golem servants to enemy spellcasters (randomized types). SCS's AI components may render this partially redundant — SCS already improves spellcaster tactics. Both can coexist but overlap. BG2EE/EET/SoD.

co.n: Greater variety of enemy golem types
co.tp2n: Greater variety of enemy golem types
co.no: Increases diversity of enemy golem types and their tactical use. More varied encounters with different golem varieties. BG2EE/EET/SoD.

co.n: Fighter Stronghold golems may continue to serve you
co.tp2n: Fighter Stronghold golems may continue to serve you
co.no: Surviving chapel golems from de'Arnise Keep may continue to serve you at the Fighter Stronghold. BG2EE/EET only. Nice QoL for fighter PCs.

co.n: Make golems vulnerable to specific spell effects
co.tp2n: Make golems vulnerable to specific spell effects
co.no: Makes golems vulnerable to specific spell effects (e.g., Flesh Golem vulnerable to fire). Adds tactical options for dealing with golems. All supported games.

co.n: Reduce weapon immunities and resistances for constructed golems
co.tp2n: Reduce weapon immunities and resistances for constructed golems
co.no: Reduces weapon immunity and resistance levels for player-constructed golems. Balance tweak — makes golems less overpowered. All supported games.
Auto-identifies all mod-added items. Convenience — no need to cast Identify on GC items. All supported games.
Adds a Teleport ability to golems, letting them follow you across areas. Major QoL — without this, golems stay behind when you leave an area. All supported games.
